data.body: 7e53 HMAC-legacy: needed 2 remediation rounds (BLOCK->BLOCK->PASS): reviewer correctly flagged that real legacy records aren't DSSE-PAE-shaped; rewrote ACs to scope HmacScheme as forward-looking HMAC-over-PAE + regression guard on untouched signing.py.
